text: Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Towanda, IL an extensive search was made for recent comparable sales in competing rural communities in McLean County. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, age, design, quality, condition, GLA, room count, and unfinished basement. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 8.2% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition, GLA, garage space count, enclosed porch, and lack of a shed. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, garage space count, lack of a shed, and fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, view, condition, GLA, lack of a main floor bedroom, garage space count, lack of a deck, lack of a fireplace, and lack of a shed. See Comparables #4, #5, & #6.
